name: GIGABYTE A620M GAMING X Micro ATX Motherboard - Socket AM5 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 2x PCIe 3.0 x1 - Support DDR5-6400+(OC) - 2x M.2 Slots - HDMI 2.1 - 2x DisplayPort 1.4 - USB 3.2 Gen1 Type-A - Realtek 2.5GbE LAN - Wi-Fi 6 802.11ax - BT 5.3
